privileged_info_summary: All metadata claims are verified. The task requires creating a calendar event in a local Odoo instance (localhost:8069) with synthetic data. Event name: 'System Architecture Review'. Date: Friday, March 13, 2026, at 9:00 AM with a duration of exactly 2.0 hours (120 minutes calculated from four agenda items: 15+40+35+30 minutes). Location: Engineering Lab. Attendees: David Chen (Lead Engineer) and Emma Thompson (Product Manager), both synthetic contacts. Description must include keywords: Microservices, Sharding, Introduction, Action Items.
